headline: ResMed: Fear-Driven Selloff Creates A Compelling Margin Of Safety Entry Point
summary: ResMed (RMD) exemplifies the razor-and-blade model, leveraging inevitability, brand loyalty, inexpensive recurring costs, and a superior user experience. Read the full stock analysis here.
